_meta.description: Source of truth for App Store Connect and Game Center localizations.
_meta.instructions: Edit only the 'en' (English) fields. Leave other locales as null. Run upload_metadata.py — Claude fills missing locales and uploads everything. Filled translations are cached back into this file so re-runs are cheap.

whats_new._tone: Brief, friendly release notes. Use line breaks (\n) between bullet points.

version_localizations._inherit_notes: description, keywords, and promotional_text default to inheriting from the most recent prior App Store version per locale. Leave 'en' (and all locales) as null to inherit. Fill in 'en' and ask Claude Code to translate when you want to override.

description._tone: Marketing copy for the App Store listing. Conversational, inviting, highlights gameplay.

keywords._tone: Comma-separated, no spaces after commas to maximize use of the 100-character limit. Search terms only.

promotional_text._tone: Short hook that appears above the description. Updateable without resubmitting a new app version.

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Game-specific name for winning Gin Rummy for the first time.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win your first game of Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.da: Vind dit første spil Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne dein erstes Spiel Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.es: Gana tu primera partida de Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez votre première partie de Gin Rami.
before_earned_description.hi: जिन रम्मी का अपना पहला गेम जीतें।
before_earned_description.it: Vinci la tua prima partita di Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.ja: ジンラミーで初めて勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn ditt første spill Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.nl: Win je eerste spelletje Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença sua primeira partida de Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.ru: Выиграйте свою первую партию в джин-рамми.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ditt första parti Gin Rummy.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng ván Gin Rummy đầu tiên của bạn.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 赢得你的第一局金拉米。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 贏得你的第一局金拉米。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won your first game of Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.da: Du vandt dit første spil Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast dein erstes Spiel Gin Rummy gewonnen!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Ganaste tu primera partida de Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné votre première partie de Gin Rami !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने जिन रम्मी का अपना पहला गेम जीत लिया!
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto la tua prima partita di Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.ja: ジンラミーで初勝利を挙げました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du vant ditt første spill Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.nl: Je hebt je eerste spelletje Gin Rummy gewonnen!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você venceu sua primeira partida de Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы выиграли свою первую партию в джин-рамми!
after_earned_description.sv: Du vann ditt första parti Gin Rummy!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng ván Gin Rummy đầu tiên!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你赢得了第一局金拉米！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你贏得了第一局金拉米！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Marks the rarest Gin Rummy win — the entire hand is one unbroken same-suit run (a perfect straight).

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win a game of Gin Rummy with your entire hand forming a single run of the same suit.
before_earned_description.da: Vind et spil Gin Rummy, hvor hele din hånd danner én sammenhængende række i samme kulør.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne ein Spiel Gin Rummy, bei dem dein gesamtes Blatt eine einzige Folge derselben Farbe bildet.
before_earned_description.es: Gana una partida de Gin Rummy con toda tu mano formando una sola escalera del mismo palo.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez une partie de Gin Rami avec toute votre main formant une seule suite de la même couleur.
before_earned_description.hi: जिन रम्मी का एक गेम जीतें जिसमें आपका पूरा हाथ एक ही सूट की एक सीधी क्रम बनाता हो।
before_earned_description.it: Vinci una partita di Gin Rummy con tutta la tua mano che forma un'unica scala dello stesso seme.
before_earned_description.ja: 手札すべてが同じスートの一続きの並びになった状態でジンラミーに勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.ko: 전체 패가 같은 무늬의 하나의 연속된 런을 이루는 상태로 진 러미에서 승리하세요.
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn et spill Gin Rummy der hele hånden din danner én sammenhengende rekke i samme farge.
before_earned_description.nl: Win een spelletje Gin Rummy waarbij je hele hand één aaneengesloten reeks van dezelfde kleur vormt.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença uma partida de Gin Rummy com toda a sua mão formando uma única sequência do mesmo naipe.
before_earned_description.ru: Выиграйте партию в джин-рамми, когда вся ваша рука образует одну непрерывную последовательность одной масти.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ett parti Gin Rummy där hela din hand bildar en enda svit i samma färg.
before_earned_description.tr: Tüm eliniz aynı türden tek bir diziden oluşacak şekilde bir Gin Rummy oyunu kazanın.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng một ván Gin Rummy với toàn bộ bài trên tay tạo thành một dãy liên tiếp cùng chất.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 在金拉米中获胜，且整手牌构成同花色的一条完整顺子。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 在金拉米中獲勝，且整手牌構成同花色的一條完整順子。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won Gin Rummy with one perfect run — nothing but a straight!
after_earned_description.da: Du vandt Gin Rummy med én perfekt række — intet andet end en stribe!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast Gin Rummy mit einer perfekten Folge gewonnen — nichts als eine Reihe!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Ganaste el Gin Rummy con una escalera perfecta y nada más!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné le Gin Rami avec une suite parfaite, rien d'autre !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने जिन रम्मी सिर्फ एक परफेक्ट स्ट्रेट के साथ जीता!
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto a Gin Rummy con un'unica scala perfetta, niente di più!
after_earned_description.ja: 完璧なストレート1本だけでジンラミーに勝利しました！
after_earned_description.ko: 완벽한 런 하나, 오직 스트레이트만으로 진 러미에서 승리했습니다!
after_earned_description.nb: Du vant Gin Rummy med én perfekt rekke — ikke noe annet enn en stige!
after_earned_description.nl: Je won Gin Rummy met één perfecte reeks — niets dan een rechte!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você venceu o Gin Rummy com uma sequência perfeita e nada mais!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы выиграли джин-рамми одной идеальной последовательностью — ничего, кроме стрита!
after_earned_description.sv: Du vann Gin Rummy med en enda perfekt svit — inget annat än en stege!
after_earned_description.tr: Gin Rummy'yi tek bir kusursuz diziyle kazandınız — düz diziden başka bir şey yok!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng Gin Rummy chỉ với một sảnh hoàn hảo!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你仅凭一条完美顺子赢得了金拉米！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你僅憑一條完美順子贏得了金拉米！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Crazy 8s achievement for discarding an 8 — the wild card that lets you change the suit.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.hi: क्रेज़ी 8s में एक 8 का पत्ता फेंकें।
before_earned_description.ja: クレイジーエイトで8を捨てましょう。
before_earned_description.vi: Đánh ra một lá 8 trong Crazy 8s.

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You played a wild 8 and called the suit!
after_earned_description.da: Du spillede et vildt 8'er og valgte kuløren!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast eine wilde 8 gespielt und die Farbe bestimmt!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Jugaste un 8 comodín y elegiste el palo!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez joué un 8 sauvage et choisi la couleur !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने एक वाइल्ड 8 खेला और सूट चुना!
after_earned_description.it: Hai giocato un 8 jolly e scelto il seme!
after_earned_description.ja: ワイルドな8を出してスートを指定しました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du spilte en vill 8-er og valgte fargen!
after_earned_description.nl: Je speelde een wilde 8 en koos de kleur!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você jogou um 8 coringa e escolheu o naipe!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы сыграли дикую восьмёрку и выбрали масть!
after_earned_description.sv: Du spelade en vild 8:a och valde färgen!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã đánh lá 8 đầy quyền năng và chọn chất!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你打出一张百搭8并指定了花色！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你打出一張百搭8並指定了花色！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Crazy 8s achievement for discarding a 2 — forces the next player to draw two cards.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.hi: क्रेज़ी 8s में एक 2 का पत्ता फेंकें।
before_earned_description.ja: クレイジーエイトで2を捨てましょう。
before_earned_description.vi: Đánh ra một lá 2 trong Crazy 8s.

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You played a 2 and made someone draw!
after_earned_description.da: Du spillede et 2'er og fik nogen til at trække kort!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast eine 2 gespielt und jemanden zum Ziehen gezwungen!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Jugaste un 2 e hiciste que alguien robara cartas!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez joué un 2 et forcé quelqu'un à piocher !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने एक 2 खेला और किसी को पत्ते उठाने पर मजबूर किया!
after_earned_description.it: Hai giocato un 2 e fatto pescare qualcuno!
after_earned_description.ja: 2を出して相手にカードを引かせました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du spilte en 2-er og tvang noen til å trekke kort!
after_earned_description.nl: Je speelde een 2 en liet iemand kaarten pakken!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você jogou um 2 e fez alguém comprar cartas!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы сыграли двойку и заставили кого-то взять карты!
after_earned_description.sv: Du spelade en 2:a och tvingade någon att dra kort!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã đánh lá 2 và bắt người khác bốc bài!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你打出一张2，让别人摸牌！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你打出一張2，讓別人摸牌！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Crazy 8s achievement for discarding a queen — skips the next player's turn.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.de: Lege in Crazy 8s eine Dame ab.
before_earned_description.ja: クレイジーエイトでクイーンを捨てましょう。
before_earned_description.nl: Leg een vrouw af in Crazy 8s.
before_earned_description.sv: Lägg av en dam i Crazy 8s.
before_earned_description.vi: Đánh ra một lá Q (đầm) trong Crazy 8s.

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You played a queen and skipped a turn!
after_earned_description.da: Du spillede en dame og sprang en tur over!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast eine Dame gespielt und einen Zug übersprungen!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Jugaste una reina y saltaste un turno!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez joué une dame et sauté un tour !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने एक क्वीन खेली और एक बारी छोड़ दी!
after_earned_description.it: Hai giocato una regina e saltato un turno!
after_earned_description.ja: クイーンを出して相手のターンを飛ばしました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du spilte en dame og hoppet over en tur!
after_earned_description.nl: Je speelde een vrouw en sloeg een beurt over!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você jogou uma dama e pulou um turno!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы сыграли даму и пропустили ход соперника!
after_earned_description.sv: Du spelade en dam och hoppade över en tur!
after_earned_description.tr: Bir kız oynayıp bir sırayı atlattınız!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã đánh lá đầm và bỏ qua một lượt!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你打出一张Q，跳过了一个回合！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你打出一張Q，跳過了一個回合！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Crazy 8s achievement for discarding an ace in a group chat game — reverses the turn order.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Discard an ace in a group chat game of Crazy 8s to reverse the turn order.
before_earned_description.da: Smid et es i et gruppechat-spil Crazy 8s for at vende rækkefølgen.
before_earned_description.de: Lege in einem Gruppenchat-Spiel Crazy 8s ein Ass ab, um die Zugreihenfolge umzukehren.
before_earned_description.es: Descarta un as en una partida de Crazy 8s en chat grupal para invertir el orden de los turnos.
before_earned_description.fr: Défaussez un as dans une partie de Crazy 8s en discussion de groupe pour inverser l'ordre des tours.
before_earned_description.hi: टर्न का क्रम उलटने के लिए ग्रुप चैट के क्रेज़ी 8s गेम में एक इक्का फेंकें।
before_earned_description.it: Scarta un asso in una partita di Crazy 8s in chat di gruppo per invertire l'ordine dei turni.
before_earned_description.ja: グループチャットのクレイジーエイトでエースを捨てて手番の順序を逆にしましょう。
before_earned_description.ko: 그룹 채팅 크레이지 8s 게임에서 에이스를 버려 차례 순서를 뒤집으세요.
before_earned_description.nb: Kast et ess i et gruppechat-spill Crazy 8s for å snu rekkefølgen.
before_earned_description.nl: Leg een aas af in een groepschat-spel Crazy 8s om de beurtvolgorde om te keren.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Descarte um ás em uma partida de Crazy 8s em conversa em grupo para inverter a ordem dos turnos.
before_earned_description.ru: Сбросьте туза в групповом чате Crazy 8s, чтобы изменить порядок ходов.
before_earned_description.sv: Lägg av ett ess i ett gruppchatt-parti Crazy 8s för att vända turordningen.
before_earned_description.tr: Sıra düzenini tersine çevirmek için grup sohbetindeki bir Crazy 8s oyununda bir as atın.
before_earned_description.vi: Đánh ra một lá Át trong ván Crazy 8s ở nhóm chat để đảo ngược thứ tự lượt.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 在群聊的疯狂8游戏中打出一张A以反转出牌顺序。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 在群聊的瘋狂8遊戲中打出一張A以反轉出牌順序。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You played an ace and flipped the table around!
after_earned_description.da: Du spillede et es og vendte bordet på hovedet!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast ein Ass gespielt und den Spieß umgedreht!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Jugaste un as y le diste la vuelta a la mesa!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez joué un as et renversé la table !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने एक इक्का खेला और पूरा खेल पलट दिया!
after_earned_description.it: Hai giocato un asso e ribaltato il tavolo!
after_earned_description.ja: エースを出して場をひっくり返しました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du spilte et ess og snudde bordet på hodet!
after_earned_description.nl: Je speelde een aas en draaide de tafel om!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você jogou um ás e virou a mesa!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы сыграли туза и перевернули игру!
after_earned_description.sv: Du spelade ett ess och vände på hela bordet!
after_earned_description.tr: Bir as oynayıp masayı tersine çevirdiniz!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã đánh lá Át và lật ngược cả bàn chơi!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你打出一张A，扭转了整个牌局！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你打出一張A，扭轉了整個牌局！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Marks a skillful Crazy 8s win — emptying your hand on exactly your eighth turn.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win a game of Crazy 8s on exactly your eighth turn.
before_earned_description.da: Vind et spil Crazy 8s på præcis din ottende tur.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne ein Spiel Crazy 8s in genau deinem achten Zug.
before_earned_description.es: Gana una partida de Crazy 8s exactamente en tu octavo turno.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez une partie de Crazy 8s exactement à votre huitième tour.
before_earned_description.hi: ठीक अपनी आठवीं बारी पर क्रेज़ी 8s का एक गेम जीतें।
before_earned_description.it: Vinci una partita di Crazy 8s esattamente al tuo ottavo turno.
before_earned_description.ja: ちょうど8回目の手番でクレイジーエイトに勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.ko: 정확히 여덟 번째 차례에 크레이지 8s 게임을 승리하세요.
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn et spill Crazy 8s på nøyaktig din åttende tur.
before_earned_description.nl: Win een spelletje Crazy 8s op precies je achtste beurt.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença uma partida de Crazy 8s exatamente no seu oitavo turno.
before_earned_description.ru: Выиграйте партию в Crazy 8s ровно на восьмом ходу.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ett parti Crazy 8s på exakt din åttonde tur.
before_earned_description.tr: Tam olarak sekizinci sıranızda bir Crazy 8s oyunu kazanın.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng một ván Crazy 8s đúng vào lượt thứ tám của bạn.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 在恰好第八个回合赢得一局疯狂8。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 在恰好第八個回合贏得一局瘋狂8。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won Crazy 8s in exactly eight turns!
after_earned_description.da: Du vandt Crazy 8s på præcis otte ture!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast Crazy 8s in genau acht Zügen gewonnen!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné Crazy 8s en exactement huit tours !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने ठीक आठ बारियों में क्रेज़ी 8s जीता!
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto a Crazy 8s in esattamente otto turni!
after_earned_description.ja: ちょうど8回の手番でクレイジーエイトに勝利しました！
after_earned_description.ko: 정확히 여덟 번의 차례 만에 크레이지 8s에서 승리했습니다!
after_earned_description.nb: Du vant Crazy 8s på nøyaktig åtte turer!
after_earned_description.nl: Je won Crazy 8s in precies acht beurten!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você venceu Crazy 8s em exatamente oito turnos!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы выиграли Crazy 8s ровно за восемь ходов!
after_earned_description.sv: Du vann Crazy 8s på exakt åtta turer!
after_earned_description.tr: Crazy 8s'i tam olarak sekiz sırada kazandınız!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng Crazy 8s đúng trong tám lượt!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你恰好用八个回合赢得了疯狂8！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你恰好用八個回合贏得了瘋狂8！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Golf achievement for winning with a perfect final score of 0 — the lowest possible.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win a game of Golf with a final score of 0.
before_earned_description.da: Vind et spil Golf med en slutscore på 0.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne ein Spiel Golf mit einem Endstand von 0.
before_earned_description.es: Gana una partida de Golf con una puntuación final de 0.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez une partie de Golf avec un score final de 0.
before_earned_description.hi: 0 के अंतिम स्कोर के साथ गोल्फ का एक गेम जीतें।
before_earned_description.it: Vinci una partita di Golf con un punteggio finale di 0.
before_earned_description.ja: 最終スコア0でゴルフに勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn et spill Golf med en sluttscore på 0.
before_earned_description.nl: Win een spelletje Golf met een eindscore van 0.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença uma partida de Golf com pontuação final de 0.
before_earned_description.ru: Выиграйте партию в гольф с итоговым счётом 0.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ett parti Golf med slutpoängen 0.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng một ván Golf với điểm số cuối cùng là 0.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 以最终得分0赢得一局高尔夫。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 以最終得分0贏得一局高爾夫。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won Golf with a flawless score of 0!
after_earned_description.da: Du vandt Golf med en fejlfri score på 0!
after_earned_description.de: Du hast Golf mit einem makellosen Ergebnis von 0 gewonnen!
after_earned_description.es: ¡Ganaste el Golf con una puntuación impecable de 0!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné le Golf avec un score parfait de 0 !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने 0 के बेदाग स्कोर के साथ गोल्फ जीता!
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto a Golf con un punteggio impeccabile di 0!
after_earned_description.ja: 完璧なスコア0でゴルフに勝利しました！
after_earned_description.nb: Du vant Golf med en feilfri score på 0!
after_earned_description.nl: Je won Golf met een vlekkeloze score van 0!
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você venceu o Golf com uma pontuação impecável de 0!
after_earned_description.ru: Вы выиграли гольф с безупречным счётом 0!
after_earned_description.sv: Du vann Golf med felfria 0 poäng!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng Golf với điểm số hoàn hảo là 0!
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你以完美的0分赢得了高尔夫！
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你以完美的0分贏得了高爾夫！

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Marks the rarest Golf win — emptying the round holding only royal cards (jacks, queens, kings). Slightly baffling, 'how is that even possible?' energy.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win a game of Golf with a hand of only royal cards.
before_earned_description.da: Vind et spil Golf med en hånd bestående udelukkende af billedkort — knægte, damer og konger.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne ein Spiel Golf mit einem Blatt aus ausschließlich Bildkarten — Buben, Damen und Königen.
before_earned_description.es: Gana una partida de Golf con una mano de solo figuras: jotas, reinas y reyes.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez une partie de Golf avec une main composée uniquement de figures — valets, dames et rois.
before_earned_description.hi: केवल शाही पत्तों — गुलाम, क्वीन और बादशाह — के हाथ के साथ गोल्फ का एक गेम जीतें।
before_earned_description.it: Vinci una partita di Golf con una mano di sole figure — fanti, regine e re.
before_earned_description.ja: 絵札（ジャック、クイーン、キング）だけの手札でゴルフに勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.ko: 그림 카드(잭, 퀸, 킹)만으로 이루어진 패로 골프 게임을 승리하세요.
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn et spill Golf med en hånd bestående kun av billedkort — knekter, damer og konger.
before_earned_description.nl: Win een spelletje Golf met een hand van alleen plaatjeskaarten — boeren, vrouwen en heren.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença uma partida de Golf com uma mão só de figuras — valetes, damas e reis.
before_earned_description.ru: Выиграйте партию в гольф с рукой только из фигурных карт — валетов, дам и королей.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ett parti Golf med en hand som bara består av klädda kort — knektar, damer och kungar.
before_earned_description.tr: Yalnızca taşlı kartlardan — valeler, kızlar ve papazlar — oluşan bir elle Golf oyunu kazanın.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng một ván Golf với bộ bài chỉ toàn lá hình — J, Q và K.
before_earned_description.zh-Hans: 以一手全是花牌（J、Q、K）赢得一局高尔夫。
before_earned_description.zh-Hant: 以一手全是花牌（J、Q、K）贏得一局高爾夫。

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won Golf holding nothing but royals.
after_earned_description.da: Du vandt Golf med intet andet end billedkort på hånden.
after_earned_description.de: Du hast Golf mit nichts als Bildkarten auf der Hand gewonnen.
after_earned_description.es: Ganaste el Golf sin nada más que figuras en la mano.
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné le Golf avec rien d'autre que des figures en main.
after_earned_description.hi: आपने हाथ में सिर्फ शाही पत्तों के साथ गोल्फ जीता।
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto a Golf con in mano solo figure.
after_earned_description.ja: 絵札だけを手にゴルフに勝利しました。
after_earned_description.ko: 그림 카드만 손에 쥔 채 골프에서 승리했습니다.
after_earned_description.nb: Du vant Golf med ikke noe annet enn billedkort på hånden.
after_earned_description.nl: Je won Golf met niets dan plaatjeskaarten in je hand.
after_earned_description.pt-BR: Você venceu o Golf segurando apenas figuras.
after_earned_description.ru: Вы выиграли гольф, держа в руке одни лишь фигурные карты.
after_earned_description.sv: Du vann Golf med inget annat än klädda kort på hand.
after_earned_description.tr: Golf'ü elinizde yalnızca taşlı kartlarla kazandınız.
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng Golf khi trên tay chỉ toàn lá hình.
after_earned_description.zh-Hans: 你满手只剩花牌赢得了高尔夫。
after_earned_description.zh-Hant: 你滿手只剩花牌贏得了高爾夫。

title._tone: Punchy. Marks the player's very first win across any game.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do.
before_earned_description.en: Win a game for the first time.
before_earned_description.da: Vind et spil for første gang.
before_earned_description.de: Gewinne zum ersten Mal ein Spiel.
before_earned_description.es: Gana una partida por primera vez.
before_earned_description.fr: Gagnez une partie pour la première fois.
before_earned_description.it: Vinci una partita per la prima volta.
before_earned_description.ja: 初めてゲームに勝利しましょう。
before_earned_description.nb: Vinn et spill for første gang.
before_earned_description.nl: Win voor het eerst een spel.
before_earned_description.pt-BR: Vença uma partida pela primeira vez.
before_earned_description.sv: Vinn ett spel för första gången.
before_earned_description.vi: Thắng một ván đấu lần đầu tiên.

after_earned_description.de: Du hast dein erstes Spiel gewonnen!
after_earned_description.fr: Vous avez gagné votre première partie !
after_earned_description.hi: आपने अपना पहला गेम जीत लिया!
after_earned_description.it: Hai vinto la tua prima partita!
after_earned_description.ja: 初めてのゲームに勝利しました！
after_earned_description.nl: Je hebt je eerste spel gewonnen!
after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng ván đầu tiên!

title._tone: Punchy. Marks the player's second win — they're getting the hang of it.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do.

title._tone: Punchy. Marks 10 total wins — a respectable milestone.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do.
Tells the player what they need to do.

title._tone: Punchy. Marks 100 total wins — a major milestone, slightly grand.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do.

after_earned_description.vi: Bạn đã thắng 100 ván. Huyền thoại.
